grants.title: EQT Foundation - Critical Minerals Science Grants
grants.description: EQT Foundation science grants for researchers working on critical minerals, climate technology, and green transition. Supports scientists affiliated with accredited nonprofit institutions. Focus areas include deeptech, sustainability, and decarbonization.
grants.eligibility: Scientists affiliated with accredited nonprofit institutions. Partnership pathway: Core Element AI can apply via Colorado School of Mines or Stanford Mineral-X affiliation.

grants.title: Sloan Foundation - Energy & Environment Research Grants
grants.description: The Sloan Foundation's Energy & Environment program supports research on energy systems, environmental science, and the transition to sustainable energy. Relevant to critical minerals research and clean technology.
grants.eligibility: Primarily funds academic researchers. Partnership pathway through university affiliations (CSM, Stanford, Berkeley).

grants.title: Colorado Advanced Industries Proof of Concept Grant
grants.description: Provides early-stage capital to advance the development of a commercially viable product or process in one of Colorado's Advanced Industries: aerospace, advanced manufacturing, bioscience, electronics, energy and natural resources, infrastructure engineering, and technology and information.
grants.eligibility: Must be a Colorado-based company or partnered with a Colorado research institution. Small businesses encouraged. Core Element AI qualifies via Colorado School of Mines partnership.

grants.title: Delaware EDGE Grant - STEM Track
grants.description: Encouraging Development, Growth, and Expansion (EDGE) Grants for STEM-focused businesses. Supports technology companies incorporated in Delaware with growth capital.
grants.eligibility: Must be incorporated in Delaware. Small business. Core Element AI qualifies as Delaware S-Corp.

grants.title: DOE Battery Materials Processing NOFO
grants.description: Department of Energy Manufacturing and Energy Supply Chains office funding for battery materials processing and critical mineral supply chain development. NOI released August 2025, full NOFO expected Q2 2026. Relevant for AI-driven mineral exploration and processing optimization.
grants.eligibility: Open to US entities. Small businesses, universities, national labs, and consortia eligible.

grants.title: ARPA-E Critical Minerals Discovery Program
grants.description: ARPA-E program for transformative approaches to critical minerals discovery and extraction. Expected to fund novel AI/ML approaches to geological exploration.
grants.eligibility: Open to US entities. High-risk high-reward research.

grants.title: Horizon Europe MAT-PROD-11: Innovative Technologies for Exploration & Data Modelling of Raw Materials
grants.description: Research and innovation actions for AI-driven mineral exploration, geophysical data fusion, and predictive resource modelling. Directly aligned with Core Element AI's geological foundation models.
grants.eligibility: Consortia of 3+ entities from EU/associated countries. Core Element AI eligible via EU subsidiary or consortium partnership.

grants.title: EIC Accelerator - Green Deal Innovation
grants.description: Blended finance (grant + equity) for deep-tech startups with breakthrough green technologies. Supports AI-driven solutions for sustainable resource management.
grants.eligibility: SMEs and startups. Single applicant. EU entity or willing to establish EU presence.

grants.title: EIT RawMaterials KAVA 13 - Innovation Projects
grants.description: Knowledge and Innovation Community funding for raw materials innovation. Supports projects in exploration, processing, recycling, and substitution of critical raw materials.
grants.eligibility: EIT RawMaterials partners or new applicants via open calls. Consortia required.

grants.title: DARPA I2O Broad Agency Announcement - AI/ML for Strategic Resources
grants.description: Open BAA for innovative AI/ML research proposals. Includes interest in applying machine learning to national security resource challenges including critical mineral supply chain resilience.
grants.eligibility: US entities. Small businesses, universities, and research institutions eligible.

grants.title: O'Shaughnessy Fellowship - Ventures Program
grants.description: Fellowships for ambitious builders working on hard problems. Supports founders tackling frontier challenges in science and technology, including resource discovery and AI.
grants.eligibility: Individual founders or small teams working on transformative projects.

grants.title: Emergent Ventures - Fast Grants for Ambitious Projects
grants.description: Rapid funding for ambitious projects and ideas. Supports unconventional thinkers working on important problems including technology, science, and social innovation.
grants.eligibility: Open to individuals worldwide. Focus on high-potential, unconventional projects.

grants.title: Foresight Institute - Intelligent Cooperation Grants
grants.description: Grants for projects at the intersection of AI, nanotechnology, and existential hope. Supports work on transformative technologies including molecular machines, computational materials, and resource optimization.
grants.eligibility: Researchers and teams working on transformative technology projects.

grants.title: Innovate UK - Sovereign AI & Critical Minerals Technology
grants.description: UK government funding for sovereign AI capabilities applied to national resource challenges. Includes critical minerals mapping, AI-driven exploration, and supply chain technology.
grants.eligibility: UK-based entities or international collaborators with UK partner. Core Element AI can partner via UK university.
